Hearts of Iron IV

August 15, 2025 · 1 min read
Random

I have started playing Hearts of Iron 4 by Paradox Interactive. It is a really good game. There is a lot of stuff, and the learning curve is very steep. I think I've logged something like 30 hours in the game so far and I am still losing most of the time. I enjoy playing as the USA. Hopefully I will get better.

signed
